---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Metochina
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work? Include CLI examples if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or references.
